falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $30,000 (key resistance level from bottom_2022_may_luna pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidates the HOLD signal by confirming a trend reversal contrary to the pattern's historical behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200%+ of the 30-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market conviction, contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a decisive trend is forming.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff Score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would directly contradict the current score of 37, proving the HOLD verdict is incorrect by showing accelerating momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
